analysis_result: Approximately 6.9%-24.1% of premalignant NF (G3) samples show 9p loss encompassing CDKN2A, depending on log2 ratio threshold (2/29 = 6.9% at log2<-0.15; 7/29 = 24.1% at log2<-0.10). Python-CONUMEE-substitute used because R/Bioconductor CONUMEE was not installable.
assumptions_made: CONUMEE R package unavailable - Python methylprep substitute used; arm-level threshold required calibration; event defined as arm-level 9p loss AND concurrent CDKN2A locus loss; threshold sensitivity substantial (6.9% at -0.15; 24.1% at -0.10); worker reached context limit before finalizing single best threshold; exact paper value could not be pinpointed from this substitute pipeline
step_by_step_analysis: Worker parsed all 108 IDAT files via methylprep, computed log2 intensity ratios vs reference panel, and attempted arm-level 9p calls for 29 G3 samples. Results varied widely by threshold: log2<-0.15 gave 2/29 (6.9%); log2<-0.10 gave 7/29 (24.1%). Worker exhausted context before converging on a single threshold matching paper's reported frequency. Result should be flagged for Phase 3 review; reasonable range 6.9%-24.1%.
